response: Lisa shares that the March onboarding cohort’s overall satisfaction fell to 7.2/10 from 8.1, noting strong positives including the 9.1/10 rated buddy system and timely IT onboarding, as well as critical issues: 5 out of 8 cohort members were confused about benefits deadlines, tool access took 3-5 days instead of the 1-day target, and no culture handbook was received by the group. The specified top priority to improve the onboarding process is resolving the delayed tool access issue.
